Sequential.Name: update_departments_many[0]
Sequential.SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "budget" = $1::numeric WHERE departments."name" = $2::text RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."budget" AS "budget" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))

Sequential.Name: update_departments_many[1]
Sequential.SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "budget" = $1::numeric WHERE departments."budget" < $2::numeric RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."budget" AS "budget" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
